3f858f1070e9.16ffa54e3d22: Automated Business Lead Search Without Manual Hassle
c3686b1c83cf.b485f44b86e3: Flaat Studio provides a solution to transform the time-consuming process of finding client databases into an efficient automated workflow. This system can search hundreds of business prospects from Google Maps based on specified keywords and locations, then neatly compile them in Excel format. Clients no longer need to open Google Maps one by one, manually copy data, or worry about incomplete contact information.
7aa656c9dd2f.4f755c8797fc: Not all prospects are created equal. Flaat Studio integrates a filtering system that allows clients to refine search results based on minimum business ratings, ensuring only reputable prospects enter the database. Input validation and error handling features ensure stable operation, even during large-volume searches. Each result includes complete information such as business name, phone number, address, and rating.
d1c0be969474.98a0ca4523d2: Fast Implementation with Stable and Affordable Infrastructure
2850b04fcdb2.c82cb80a3911: This solution is built on the reliable n8n platform, integrated with the Apify API for consistent Google Maps data access. Flaat Studio handles all technical setup, including workflow configuration, API credential management, and automated export to ready-to-use Excel format. Clients receive a system that can be run repeatedly with minimal operational costs, without expensive software subscriptions or dedicated data entry teams.
4d19654833f0.f4b1bee38e9b: Full Support from Setup to Go-Live
9e5f259f3e45.d7762b171414: Flaat Studio doesn't just hand over the system — we ensure clients can operate it independently. Services include workflow installation on the client's n8n server, training on search form usage, guidance on interpreting results, and troubleshooting technical issues. The team also provides complete documentation and periodic support to ensure optimal performance as Google Maps policies evolve.
